name: clawpipe
description: The intelligent AI pipeline. Booster -> Packer -> Cache -> Router -> Call -> Learn across 21 providers without changing app logic. Bundles 6 AI security analyst skills (reasoning, triage, remediation, compliance, threat-intel, incident). Public measured benchmark in progress.
author: ClawPipe

CLAWPIPE_API_KEY.description: Your ClawPipe API key (get one at https://app.clawpipe.ai)

CLAWPIPE_PROJECT_ID.description: Project id for analytics and rate limiting

tools.name: clawpipe_prompt
tools.description: Send a prompt through the ClawPipe pipeline (Booster -> Pack -> Cache -> Route -> Call -> Learn). Returns response text and pipeline metadata.

tools.name: clawpipe_analyze_cost
tools.description: Estimate the cost of a prompt without sending it. Shows token count, estimated cost per model, and potential savings from Booster and Packer.

tools.name: clawpipe_stats
tools.description: Get current session telemetry: total requests, tokens, cost, cache hit rate, top models, and average latency.

tools.name: clawpipe_booster_check
tools.description: Check if a prompt can be resolved by the Agent Booster without calling an LLM.

tools.name: clawpipe_skill_triage
tools.description: Prioritize a batch of security findings by actual exploitability.

tools.name: clawpipe_skill_remediation
tools.description: Generate a fix plus rollback for a vulnerability.

tools.name: clawpipe_skill_compliance
tools.description: Write SOC 2 / ISO 27001 / HIPAA / GDPR audit evidence.

tools.name: clawpipe_skill_threat_intel
tools.description: Enrich CVE / IOC with NVD/CIRCL-style context.

tools.name: clawpipe_skill_incident
tools.description: Reconstruct attack chain + recommend containment steps.

tools.name: clawpipe_report_to_jira
tools.description: Create a Jira issue. Use for budget breaches, cost spikes, or agent anomalies.

tools.name: clawpipe_report_to_notion
tools.description: Append a page to a Notion database. Use for cost digests, weekly summaries, incident logs.
